name: GOLFTEC Glen Allen
address: 9687 W Broad St #15, Glen Allen, VA 23060
about: GOLFTEC Glen Allen is a golf training center that offers a data-driven approach to improving golf skills. The venue utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide personalized coaching. Services include golf lessons, club fitting, and practice sessions in training bays equipped with simulator technology. The facility caters to a range of skill levels from beginners to seasoned players.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized data-driven coaching using advanced motion tracking technology
Club fitting services that can add an average of 21 more yards off the tee
Indoor practice bays with launch monitors and video feedback for targeted training

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitor for ball tracking and data analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, it is recommended to bring your own clubs for lessons and practice sessions. The venue also offers club fitting services and you can purchase clubs from their pro shop.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify a policy on bringing outside food and drinks, but it does mention a pro shop discount on gear.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The venue does not provide information on playing 18 holes, as it focuses on lessons, fitting, and practice sessions rather than full simulator play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: While the content does not explicitly state if the venue is kid-friendly, it does offer services suitable for juniors and youth, including personalized coaching and data-driven instruction.
